dating_ai_all_fields_required: Please fill in all fields first to personalize the invitation.
dating_ai_context_required: Please select your date, venue, and time first so I can craft an accurate invitation.
dating_ai_description_missing: Title was filled only — regenerate or write the message manually.
dating_ai_fields_applied: Title and message were filled in the fields below — edit them before preview.
dating_ai_fields_empty: Generation finished but we could not read the title or message. Please try again.
dating_ai_form_prerequisite: Please select your partner, venue, and time first to generate a personalized invitation.
dating_ai_prerequisites_hint: Select your invitee, venue, date, and time above to unlock AI text generation.
dating_ai_text_fields_hint: Use AI above to draft the title and message, or write them yourself.
dating_available_desc: Allow others to send you a DineBuddy Date invitation. When off, date invitations will be declined automatically.
dating_available_disable: Available for Dating — click to disable
dating_camera_idle_hint: Or tap the Camera tab above if you’re already on it — that also opens the recorder.
dating_camera_panel_hint: Record a short video for your cover. It stays saved when you switch tabs.
dating_camera_reopen_tab_hint: Tap the Camera tab again to reopen the recorder.
dating_camera_short_hint: Tap center to start or stop — max 20s.
dating_camera_video_only_hint: Video only here — add still photos from the Upload tab (library or camera).
dating_card_show_content_label: Show title, message & profile on card
dating_card_show_content_title: Off: date and place only on the card. On: show title, guest message, and profile photo.
dating_card_theme_color_hint: Same color for the frame and all text. Plain text — no shadow.
dating_cover_section_hint: Camera, upload from your device, or a ready template from the dating library.
dating_cover_template_hint: Same library as your invitation card backgrounds — used here as the hero cover.
dating_cover_template_label: Choose a template for the cover
dating_invitation_desc: Send an exclusive private date invitation to one special person.
dating_invitation_preference_desc: Control whether others can send you dating invitations.
dating_invitation_selector_desc: Send an exclusive private date to someone special
dating_invite_disabled_by_user: This person has disabled receiving dating invitations.
dating_one_person_selected: Your date is selected. Remove to choose someone else.
dating_section_templates_hint: Camera, upload, or template — thumbnails beside the card.
dating_unavailable_enable: Not available for Dating — click to enable
dating_upload_capture_title: Take a photo with the camera
dating_upload_rail_hint: Use Library or Photo on the right — your image is kept when you switch tabs.
invitation_accepted_hint: Invitation accepted successfully. You can now chat with the host and other guests.
invitation_cancelled_message: The invitation "{{title}}" has been cancelled. Reason: {{reason}}
invitation_complete_message: Great news! The invitation "{{title}}" is now complete with all {{count}} guests confirmed.
invitation_edit_count: This invitation has been edited {{count}} time(s)
invitation_ended_hint: This invitation may have ended or been removed.
invitation_layout_live_carousel_hint: Swipe or drag sideways to compare layouts. Your colors, font, and media apply to each preview — tap a card to select it.
invitation_magic_image_error: Could not generate the image. Try again or adjust your details.
invitation_magic_image_hint: Optional full pack: cover image, title, message, theme, font, and motion from your vibe, venue type, and smart description. Generate first (credits charged on success), then tap Apply only if you want it on this invitation.
invitation_magic_image_insufficient: Not enough credits for this image.
invitation_type_venue_search_hint: Pick the venue category first so results favor matching places (café, bar, restaurant, etc.).
invitation_updated_notifications_sent: Invitation updated and notifications sent to participants
invite_accepted_desc: You have successfully joined this invitation.
invite_ai_hub_coming_soon: We are designing separate AI pages for each invitation type. Until then, use “Manual invitation” from the create menu to publish invites.
invite_ai_hub_prefill_note: Any venue or context you started from will be available again once AI flows launch.
invite_ai_hub_subtitle: Dedicated AI creation — coming in the next step.
invite_create_ai_desc: Dedicated AI creation — separate page (flows arriving next).
invite_create_dating_desc: A dating-style invitation for matched dining.
invite_create_manual_desc: Fill out the classic form yourself — public, private, or dating.
invite_create_mode_sheet_subtitle: Manual form or AI-assisted flow — each opens its own page.
invite_create_mode_sheet_title: How do you want to create it?
invite_create_mode_subtitle: Choose manual forms or the AI experience — each opens its own page.
invite_create_private_desc: Invite specific guests with a private link.
invite_create_public_desc: A discoverable invitation others can browse and join.
invite_create_subtitle: Choose the type of invitation you want to create.
invite_manual_hub_subtitle: Choose the invitation type, then complete the form.
private_card_export_error: Could not create the image. Please try again.
private_card_share_unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device. Use download instead.
private_card_show_content_label: Show occasion, title, message & profile on card
private_card_show_content_title: Off: date and place only on the card. On: show occasion headline, title, message, and profile photo.
private_card_text_backdrop_photo_only: Choose a template, photo, or video cover to see the panel on the card.
private_card_text_backdrop_title: Adds a tinted panel behind invitation text on photo backgrounds.
private_cover_ai_commit_pending: Cover saved in AI photos. It will upload when you select it or publish.
private_cover_ai_rail_empty: Use “Generate with AI” above to create covers (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_ai_uploading: Saving your AI cover to storage…
private_cover_no_templates_category: No artwork files for this category yet. Add images under invitation-card-backgrounds in the app.
private_cover_stash_max_ai: You can keep up to {{max}} AI covers. Remove one from the thumbnails to generate another.
private_cover_stash_max_images: You can add up to {{max}} photos. Remove one from the thumbnails to add another.
private_cover_stash_max_videos: You can add up to {{max}} videos. Remove one from the thumbnails to record another.
private_cover_template_mode_hint: Use Camera or Upload to add a video or photo over the card.
private_cover_upload_rail_empty: Tap “Upload photo” to add from your device (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_video_rail_empty: Tap “Record video” to capture a clip (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_video_uploading: Uploading your video cover… this may take a moment.
private_desc: Only you can see your profile
private_draft_permission_denied: Could not open the draft. Sign in again and retry.
private_invitation_desc: Secret invitation only visible to people you choose from your friends list.
private_invitation_draft_banner: This invitation is still a draft — guests have not been notified yet. Open preview to review and send.
private_invitation_not_published: This invitation has not been sent yet.
private_magic_optional_intro: Not required. Use this only if you want an AI-generated cover; otherwise keep the photo or video you chose above.
private_magic_replaces_cover_note: When generation succeeds, it fills the same cover slot as your manual upload (you can switch back by picking media again).
private_magic_requires_title_location: Complete date, time, occasion, location, title, and your message before using AI.
private_magic_three_credits: Up to three credits may be charged (one per successful image). Optional — not required to publish.
private_magic_three_intro: We generate three vertical (9:16) covers suited for phones. Tap a thumbnail to use it as your invitation cover.
private_magic_three_success_all: Three AI covers are ready — pick one.
private_magic_variant_lane_a: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — warm intimate candlelit social dining, soft gold light, elegant depth, no text.
private_magic_variant_lane_b: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — stylish night-out energy, tasteful neon accents, premium nightlife mood, no text.
private_magic_variant_lane_c: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — fresh airy daytime brunch or patio, botanical hints, natural soft light, no text.
private_media_ai_blurb: Opens a floating studio. Three 9:16 options; tap one to set as your cover.
private_section_card_art_beside_hint: Template shows artwork beside the card. Tap Upload or Video to open that tab, then tap again to add photos or record video.
private_section_card_art_hint: Choose artwork for your occasion, then add a video, photo, or template layer on the card.
private_section_five_media_hint: Add a photo or video yourself, or open the AI studio to generate three vertical cover options.
private_section_media_hint: Upload your own image or video for the invitation. You can publish without using AI.
private_section_templates_hint: Pick a background style for your occasion. This is separate from the cover photo or video below.
